tasks.label: Test PDF Conversion Sample
tasks.command: cd edgequake && ./target/release/edgequake-pdf convert -i crates/edgequake-pdf/test-data/001_simple_text.pdf -o /tmp/test_001.md && echo '--- EXTRACTED ---' && cat /tmp/test_001.md && echo '' && echo '--- GOLD ---' && cat crates/edgequake-pdf/test-data/001_simple_text.gold.md 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: Analyze Test Results
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake && python3 -c "import json; data = json.load(open('/tmp/pdf_test_results/test_report.json')); results = sorted(data['results'], key=lambda x: x.get('score', 0), reverse=True); print('\n📊 Top 10 Results:'); [print(f'{i+1}. {r[\"name\"]}: {r.get(\"score\", 0):.1f}%') for i, r in enumerate(results[:10])]; print('\n📉 Bottom 10 Results:'); [print(f'{i+1}. {r[\"name\"]}: {r.get(\"score\", 0):.1f}%') for i, r in enumerate(results[-10:])]" 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: Show Top Results
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake && python3 -c "import json; data = json.load(open('/tmp/pdf_test_results/test_report.json')); results = sorted(data['results'], key=lambda x: x.get('score', 0), reverse=True); print('\nTop 15 Results:'); [print(f'{i+1:2d}. {r[\"name\"]:<40s} {r.get(\"score\", 0):6.1f}%') for i, r in enumerate(results[:15])]" 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: Commit refactoring
tasks.command:
cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake && git commit -m 'refactor(pdf): Modularize processors into single-responsibility modules

- Extract table_detection.rs: TableDetectionProcessor, TextTableReconstructionProcessor (~730 lines)
- Extract text_cleanup.rs: PostProcessor, GarbledTextFilterProcessor, HyphenContinuationProcessor (~670 lines)
- Extract structure_detection.rs: HeaderDetectionProcessor, CaptionDetectionProcessor, ListDetectionProcessor, CodeBlockDetectionProcessor (~570 lines)
- Extract layout_processing.rs: LayoutProcessor, BlockMergeProcessor, MarginFilterProcessor, SectionNumberMergeProcessor (~640 lines)
- Slim processor.rs to core traits: Processor, ProcessorChain, SectionPatternProcessor, StyleDetectionProcessor (~520 lines)
- Add test_helpers.rs for shared test utilities
- Update mod.rs with proper module organization and exports

All 133 tests pass, quality score maintained at 92.7/100.

Original processor.rs: 3712 lines (16 processors)
New modular structure: 13 focused files averaging ~350 lines each'

tasks.label: Clippy check
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake && cargo clippy --package edgequake-pdf 2>&1 | grep -E 'warning.*edgequake-pdf' | tail -3

tasks.label: Git log
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake && git log --oneline -15 | cat

tasks.label: Full git log
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake && git log --oneline -20 | head -20 | cat

tasks.label: Git status
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/crates/edgequake-pdf && git status --short 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: Check src/tests status
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/crates/edgequake-pdf && git status --short src tests 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: Quick test check
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake && cargo test --package edgequake-pdf --lib 2>&1 | tail -5

tasks.label: Count gold files
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/crates/edgequake-pdf/test-data && find gold -name '*.md' | wc -l

tasks.label: Count files per category
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/crates/edgequake-pdf/test-data/gold && for dir in */; do echo "$dir: $(find "$dir" -name '*.md' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"; done

tasks.label: Check basics
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/crates/edgequake-pdf/test-data/gold && ls -la 01-basics/

tasks.label: Commit protocol
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/crates/edgequake-pdf && git add TEST_PROTOCOL.md && git commit -m 'docs(pdf): Update TEST_PROTOCOL with accurate counts (120 gold files, 239 tests)' 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: Build PDF binary fresh
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake && cargo build --release -p edgequake-pdf --bin edgequake-pdf 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: Build with chain tracing
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake && cargo build --release -p edgequake-pdf --bin edgequake-pdf 2>&1 | cat

tasks.label: Force full rebuild
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake && rm -f target/release/edgequake-pdf && touch crates/edgequake-pdf/src/processors/processor.rs && cargo build --release -p edgequake-pdf --bin edgequake-pdf 2>&1 && ls -la target/release/edgequake-pdf

tasks.label: Wait for binary
tasks.command: while ! test -f /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/target/release/edgequake-pdf; do sleep 5; done && ls -la /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/target/release/edgequake-pdf

tasks.label: Rebuild with render logging
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake && rm -f target/release/edgequake-pdf && cargo build --release -p edgequake-pdf --bin edgequake-pdf 2>&1 && ls -la target/release/edgequake-pdf

tasks.label: Rebuild with page tracking
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake && rm -f target/release/edgequake-pdf && cargo build --release -p edgequake-pdf --bin edgequake-pdf 2>&1 && ls -la target/release/edgequake-pdf

tasks.label: Wait for build 2
tasks.command: while ! test -f /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/target/release/edgequake-pdf; do sleep 5; done && ls -la /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake/target/release/edgequake-pdf

tasks.label: Run PDF quality tests
tasks.command: cd /Users/raphaelmansuy/Github/03-working/edgequake/edgequake && cargo test --package edgequake-pdf -- quality --nocapture
